sources.name: IRS annual exempt organization information returns
facts: Exempt organizations are generally required to file annual returns unless exceptions apply.
If an organization does not file as required for three consecutive years, it automatically loses tax-exempt status.

sources.name: IRS Tax Exempt Organization Search bulk data
facts: IRS publishes bulk datasets including Pub. 78 data and Automatic Revocation of Exemption list.
Data download endpoints include revocation and active exempt organization datasets.

sources.name: OFAC sanctions guidance and list services
facts: OFAC administers sanctions programs and provides sanctions list search services.
OFAC provides civil penalties and enforcement information and compliance hotline resources.
Organizations can use sanctions list search and reporting resources for compliance controls.

sources.name: Charity Navigator accountability and finance indicators
facts: American Red Cross is displayed as 99% Four-Star Charity.
Beacon indicators explicitly include controls such as Records Retention Policy and Financial Statements.
Accountability section includes No Material Diversion of Assets and Tax Form disclosure checks.

control_baseline.requirement: Conflict of interest policy with annual attestations.
control_baseline.evidence_standard: Approved policy, annual attestation records, and board review cadence.
Board roster independence assessment and related-party transaction approvals.

control_baseline.requirement: Annual filing calendar and due-date tracking.
control_baseline.evidence_standard: Form 990/990-EZ/990-N filing status by period and due-date monitor.

control_baseline.requirement: Late filing escalation to prevent automatic revocation.
control_baseline.evidence_standard: Escalation trail when filings are late or missing across years.

control_baseline.requirement: Restricted funds tracking and spend controls.
control_baseline.evidence_standard: Restriction tags, allowed-use rules, and exception logs.
Grant terms registry, milestone checks, and supporting evidence.

control_baseline.requirement: Sanctions/AML checks for counterparties and disbursement beneficiaries.
control_baseline.evidence_standard: Screening timestamp, list source version, and match disposition records.

control_baseline.requirement: Vendor and partner due diligence with periodic renewals.
control_baseline.evidence_standard: Risk-tiered due diligence records and renewal checkpoints.
Policy version history and attestation completion logs.

control_baseline.requirement: Incident intake, investigation workflow, and remediation tracking.
control_baseline.evidence_standard: Case lifecycle records with owner, SLA, and closure evidence.

control_baseline.requirement: Role-based access control and action-level audit trail.
control_baseline.evidence_standard: Role assignment matrix, privileged access review, and immutable action logs.
